mapper.select: select id, code, name_zh as nameZh, category_code as categoryCode, sigml_object_key as sigmlObjectKey, cover_object_key as coverObjectKey from sign_resource order by id asc

select id, code, name_zh as nameZh, category_code as categoryCode, sigml_object_key as sigmlObjectKey, cover_object_key as coverObjectKey from sign_resource where category_code = #{categoryCode} order by id asc
select id, code, name_zh as nameZh, category_code as categoryCode, sigml_object_key as sigmlObjectKey, cover_object_key as coverObjectKey from sign_resource where code = #{code} limit 1
